sourceData.description: 无 ROOT 的 Android 屏幕实时翻译：截屏 → OCR（ML Kit / PaddleOCR / 百度 / 腾讯）→ LLM/DeepL → 悬浮窗叠加。Real-time on-screen translator for Android (no root): capture → OCR → LLM/DeepL → floating overlay, for games / visual novels / manga.

Why overlay-translator Is Trending

The Mobile landscape is constantly evolving, and overlay-translator has emerged as one of the fastest-growing projects this week. Several factors contribute to its momentum:

  1. Growing community: With 0 new stars this week alone, developer adoption is accelerating rapidly.
  2. Active maintenance: The project sees regular updates, ensuring compatibility with the latest ecosystem changes.
  3. Practical utility: 无 ROOT 的 Android 屏幕实时翻译：截屏 → OCR（ML Kit / PaddleOCR / 百度 / 腾讯）→ LLM/DeepL → 悬浮窗叠加。Real-time on-screen translator for Android (no root): capture → OCR → LLM/DeepL → floating overlay, for games / visual novels / manga.

If you're working in Mobile, this is definitely a project worth watching — and adopting.

How It Compares to Alternatives

When evaluating overlay-translator, it's natural to compare it against established alternatives. Here's what sets it apart:

  • Performance: Built with Kotlin, it leverages modern language features for speed.
  • Community size: 9 stars indicate strong community trust and validation.
  • License: Apache-2.0 licensing means no commercial restrictions.

Final Thoughts

overlay-translator is a solid addition to any developer's toolkit. With its growing community, active development, and practical design, it's well worth your time to evaluate. Star it on GitHub, try it in a side project, and see if it fits your workflow.
